{{CargoRelic
|name=Moon Palace Tour Guide
|class_id=20948
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=In planning the reconstruction of the Moon Palace, Chang'e prepared this tour guide manual, which provides detailed information on various scenic spots within the palace and optimal viewing times.
|fame=28
|art=15
|fth=13
|civ=16
|tech=18
|ss1=Snail HP +200<br>Per 20 CIV Wishes made, Snail ATK +1<br>Wishes Made: 1000/1000
|ss2=Snail HP +400<br>Per 20 CIV Wishes made, Snail ATK +2<br>Wishes Made: 1000/1000
|ss3=Snail HP +600<br>Per 20 CIV Wishes made, Snail ATK +3<br>Wishes Made: 1000/1000
|ss4=Snail HP +600<br>Per 20 CIV Wishes made, Snail ATK +3<br>Wishes Made: 1000/1000
|ss7=Snail HP +600<br>Per 20 CIV Wishes made, Snail ATK +3<br>Wishes Made: 1000/1000<br> (Awakened)
}}
